gt_sql: SELECT T2.CreationDate, T2.Age FROM comments AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T1.text LIKE '%http://%'
pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT u.CreationDate, u.Age 
FROM comments c
JOIN users u ON c.UserId = u.Id
WHERE u.WebsiteUrl LIKE '%http://%';
question: List the creation date and age of the user that commented with webiste.
